originalTitle: Bitcoin hits 20-month low as market sentiment sours
summary: Price of world’s most actively traded digital asset falls below $60,000 amid shift by retail investors to AI-related stock bets
content: Price of world’s most actively traded digital asset falls below $60,000 amid shift by retail investors to AI-related stock bets
chineseTitle: 市场情绪恶化，比特币触及20个月低点
chineseSummary: 随着散户投资者转向人工智能相关股票押注，全球交易最活跃的数字资产价格跌破 60,000 美元
chineseContent: 随着散户投资者转向人工智能相关股票押注，全球交易最活跃的数字资产价格跌破 60,000 美元
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
